Key_Questions_To_Validate_With_Customer: What outcomes define success for this renewal cycle?;What executive narratives or procurement steps are still open?;Which modules/stakeholders are must-have vs optional for the decision?;What internal friction or competing priorities could delay signature?
Never_Assume_Or_Guess: Budget availability without CFO confirmation;Renewal intent without named sponsor;Dates/deadlines not on record
Prep_Output_Emphasis: Commercial posture + renewal timing;Risk and mitigation owners;Agenda for exec alignment and value proof;One strategic next step tied to ARR

Key_Questions_To_Validate_With_Customer: Where is adoption weakest by site/module and why?;What leading indicators would show improvement in 30–60 days?;Which workflows or integrations block sustained usage?;What support or SA engagement is already in flight?
Never_Assume_Or_Guess: Root cause of low usage without customer confirmation;Promised fixes not in SFDC or notes
Prep_Output_Emphasis: Risk strip + adoption signals;Focused troubleshooting questions;Clear escalation path if critical

Key_Questions_To_Validate_With_Customer: Which new sites/modules hold the highest incremental value?;What ROI or internal hurdle cases are required?;Who are economic buyers vs champions for expansion?;What competitive or alternative tooling is being evaluated?
Never_Assume_Or_Guess: Expansion readiness without sponsor validation;Pricing motions without commercial facts
Prep_Output_Emphasis: Upsell hypotheses grounded in usage + commercial tier notes;Agenda to qualify scope and timing;NBAs that unlock discovery

Key_Questions_To_Validate_With_Customer: What blocking issues were committed with dates and owners?;Is this an escalation requiring exec or specialist attendance?;What must be true before the next milestone?;What did the customer already communicate in writing?
Never_Assume_Or_Guess: Severity or blame without evidence in logs/tickets;Promises your side did not make
Prep_Output_Emphasis: Timeline of commitments + escalation facts;Immediate stabilization agenda;NBAs that reduce churn/legal exposure
